# Backup Utility Golden Vectors

These vectors characterize backup expansion and restore-write behavior before KMP migration. They pin `BACKUP.TXT` expansion, concrete file read/write paths, restore payload routing, and the current platform policy split for restore failures. `BackupUtilityCommonPolicyTest.kt` now executes shared common coverage for successful backup expansion, restore write command capture, restore failure platform-split pinning, and `backup-workflow-readiness.json` behavior-family coverage. Choose whether shared KMP backup code preserves platform-specific failure aggregation or standardizes restore errors before migrating the workflow.

`backup-workflow-readiness.json` names the pre-migration behavior-family gate for backup workflow orchestration: `BACKUP.TXT` expansion, directory expansion, default user-file inclusion, backup file read order, restore PUT command planning, restore payload preservation, restore write order, restore failure platform split, restore failure aggregation decision, platform backup vector references, and the `compile-verification-gate` must remain covered before backup workflow code moves into shared KMP.
